synopsis:
Star Wars (2020) #06 is the sixth issue of the canon comic book series Star Wars (2020) in which Luke Skywalker is guided by Verla to find a new lightsaber on Tempes.
Star Wars 6 is the sixth issue of the canon comic book series Star Wars. It was written by Charles Soule, illustrated by Jesús Saiz, and published by Marvel Comics on September 16, 2020. The issue features the story "The Destiny Path: Part VI," in which Luke Skywalker is guided by Verla to find a new lightsaber on Tempes.
title: Star Wars (2020) #06
